text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
// I've begun preparing for my entry into the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* The optimal route Parcae has calculated for me
predicts that I'll lose my shot at the Triple Crown
by seven centimeters, then enter a losing streak
all senior year.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
Seven centimeters separate me from victory in
the Japanese Derby, sealing my fate. If I'm to
close this gap, I must raise my physical stats to
the values necessary to win all my races.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
991031021222. I'm looking into this
inexplicable string of numbers that Parcae
produced. I can't get rid of it no matter what. */
